name: Sherri Papini: Caught in the Lie
original_name: Sherri Papini: Caught in the Lie
overview: Sherri Papini, who faked her own kidnapping, breaks her silence, revisiting the lies, secrets, and shocking fallout of a hoax that captivated the nation.
